headline: Assessing Automatic Data Processing’s Valuation After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Setting the scene on Automatic Data Processing Automatic Data Processing (ADP) has drawn investor attention recently as its share price, last closing at US$215.06, reflects mixed return figures over different periods, including a gain over the past month and a decline over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Automatic Data Processing. That sharp 1 day share price return of 7.98% and 7 day return of 8.33% come after a weaker patch, with a 90 day share price return of a 12.87%...

headline: Dow Tumbles Over 250 Points As Oil Prices Rally: Fear Index Remains In 'Greed' Zone
summary: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index remained in the Greed zone, while US stocks closed lower. ADP and Brinker reported strong earnings.
